record.field: # Update department social scores based on approved participations departments = env['esg.department'].search([]) for dept in departments: approved = env['employee.participation'].search_count([ ('department_id', '=', dept.id), ('state', '=', 'approved'), ]) total_employees = max(dept.employee_count, 1) participation_rate = min((approved / (total_employees * 3)) * 100, 100) dept.write({'social_score': round(participation_rate, 2)})
